[136.92104077770978, 35.36787013479892], [136.9306369135628, 35.36778455891033], [136.9352374971129, 35.37021733296359], [136.93984683556312, 35.36134017091223], [136.94157031072132, [136.98526888515096, 35.32128417092781], [136.98915639445215, 35.33061250486327], [136.99483500613064, 35.33005138726179], [137.0007513877664, 35.33216805411246], [137.01215805405104, 35.33169277500161], [137.01287972851674, 35.33483472114551], [137.03244855985326, 35.33377436019862], [137.04151939000792, 35.33616550463438], [137.046229105389, 35.339442440816015], [137.0463113357996, 35.33954133296618]]]}}]}};
var store=[35.34976751320879,137.1048908116394];
var map=L.map('map',{zoomControl:true}).setView([35.30,137.05],10);
L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png',
  {maxZoom:18,attribution:'© OpenStreetMap © CARTO'}).addTo(map);

// distance rings
[10000,20000,30000].forEach(function(r){
  L.circle(store,{radius:r,color:'#7f8c8d',weight:1,dashArray:'4 5',fill:false,opacity:.5}).addTo(map);
});

var diffCol={lost:'#d7191c',down:'#f9a825',up:'#1a9641',new:'#2c7fb8'};
var diffLab={lost:'消失 (2024→0)',down:'縮小 (継続だが減少)',up:'増加',new:'新規 (2024=0)'};
function volColor(v){
  if(v<=0) return '#e8e8e8';
  if(v<50) return '#ffffb2';
  if(v<150) return '#fecc5c';
  if(v<500) return '#fd8d3c';
  if(v<1000) return '#f03b20';
  return '#bd0026';
}
function fillFor(p,mode){
  if(mode==='diff') return diffCol[p.st];
  return volColor(mode==='y2024'?p.v24:p.v26);
}

// context (light base)
L.geoJSON(DATA.context,{style:{color:'#c7d0d8',weight:.7,fillColor:'#f4f6f8',fillOpacity:.5}}).addTo(map);

var layer, ptLayer;
var bigNames={}; // labels for notable areas
function popup(p){
  var arrow=p.diff>0?('▲+'+p.diff):(p.diff<0?('▼'+p.diff):'±0');
  return '<b>'+p.name+'</b><br>2024: '+p.v24+' 人<br>2026: '+p.v26+' 人<br>増減: '+arrow
    +(p.approx?'<br><i>※位置は概略</i>':'');
}
function render(mode){
  if(layer) map.removeLayer(layer);
  if(ptLayer) map.removeLayer(ptLayer);
  layer=L.geoJSON(DATA.poly,{
    style:function(f){return {color:'#555',weight:1,fillColor:fillFor(f.properties,mode),fillOpacity:.8};},
    onEachFeature:function(f,l){
      var p=f.properties; l.bindPopup(popup(p));
      var show=Math.max(p.v24,p.v26)>=150;
      if(show) l.bindTooltip(p.name,{permanent:true,direction:'center',className:'lbl'});
    }
  }).addTo(map);
  ptLayer=L.geoJSON(DATA.points,{
    pointToLayer:function(f,latlng){
      var p=f.properties;
      return L.circleMarker(latlng,{radius:8,color:'#333',weight:1,dashArray:'2 2',
        fillColor:fillFor(p,mode),fillOpacity:.85});
    },
    onEachFeature:function(f,l){l.bindPopup(popup(f.properties));
      l.bindTooltip(f.properties.name,{direction:'top'});}
  }).addTo(map);
  // store on top
  L.circleMarker(store,{radius:7,color:'#000',weight:2,fillColor:'#00c2d1',fillOpacity:1}).addTo(map)
    .bindPopup('<b>多治見店</b><br>岐阜県多治見市西坂町5-31-1');
  updateLegend(mode);
}
var legend=L.control({position:'bottomright'});
legend.onAdd=function(){this._div=L.DomUtil.create('div','legend');return this._div;};
legend.addTo(map);
function updateLegend(mode){
  var h='';
  if(mode==='diff'){
    h='<b>凡例：2024→2026 の変化</b>';
    ['lost','down','up','new'].forEach(function(k){
      h+='<div><span class="sw" style="background:'+diffCol[k]+'"></span>'+diffLab[k]+'</div>';});
  }else{
    h='<b>凡例：来訪者数（'+(mode==='y2024'?'2024年2月':'2026年2月')+'）</b>';
    var bins=[['#bd0026','1000人以上'],['#f03b20','500–999'],['#fd8d3c','150–499'],
              ['#fecc5c','50–149'],['#ffffb2','1–49'],['#e8e8e8','0（圏外）']];
    bins.forEach(function(b){h+='<div><span class="sw" style="background:'+b[0]+'"></span>'+b[1]+'</div>';});
  }
  h+='<div><span class="sw" style="background:#00c2d1;border-radius:50%"></span>多治見店</div>';
  h+='<div class="note">点線円＝店舗から10/20/30km。破線の丸印＝位置概略の小地域。射水市(富山)・飯田市(長野)は圏外のため非表示。</div>';
  this._div=legend._div; legend._div.innerHTML=h;
}
function setMode(m){
  ['diff','y2024','y2026'].forEach(function(x){
    document.getElementById('b_'+(x==='diff'?'diff':x.slice(1))).classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById(m==='diff'?'b_diff':'b_'+m.slice(1)).classList.add('active');
  render(m);
  banner(m);
}
function banner(m){
  var b=document.getElementById('banner');
  b.innerHTML='<b>多治見店 商圏の縮小　2024年2月 → 2026年2月</b>'+
   '<div class="sub">来訪者総数 15,697人 → 7,037人（▲55%）。南の愛知方面（瀬戸・豊田・長久手ほか）が消失し、'+
   '中心核・北東も来訪数が半減。'+
   (m==='diff'?'色＝増減の種類。':'色＝その年の来訪者数（濃いほど多い）。')+'</div>';
}
render('diff'); banner('diff');
</script></body></html>
